segments.text: Now before the Feast of the Passover, when Jesus knew that His hour had come that He should depart from this world to the Father, having loved His own who were in the world, He loved them to the end.
And supper being ended, the devil having already put it into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon's son, to betray Him.
Jesus, knowing that the Father had given all things into His hands, and that He had come from God and was going to God.
Rose from supper and laid aside His garments, took a towel and girded Himself.
After that, He poured water into a basin and began to wash the disciples' feet, and to wipe them with the towel with which He was girded.
Then He came to Simon Peter.
Lord, are You washing my feet?
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Jesus answered and said to him,
What I am doing you do not understand now, but you will know after this.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You shall never wash my feet!
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: If I do not wash you, you have no part with Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, not my feet only, but also my hands and my head!
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: He who is bathed needs only to wash his feet, but is completely clean; and you are clean, but not all of you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For He knew who would betray Him; therefore He said,
You are not all clean.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So when He had washed their feet, taken His garments, and sat down again, He said to them,
Do you know what I have done to you?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You call Me Teacher and Lord, and you say well, for so I am.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If I then, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you also ought to wash one another's feet.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For I have given you an example, that you should do as I have done to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most assuredly, I say to you, a servant is not greater than his master; nor is he who is sent greater than he who sent him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I do not speak concerning all of you. I know whom I have chosen; but that the Scripture may be fulfilled, 'He who eats bread with Me has lifted up his heel against Me.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now I tell you before it comes, that when it does come to pass, you may believe that I am He.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most assuredly, I say to you, he who receives whomever I send receives Me; and he who receives Me receives Him who sent Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When Jesus had said these things, He was troubled in spirit, and testified and said,
Most assuredly, I say to you, one of you will betray Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then the disciples looked at one another, perplexed about whom He spoke.
Now there was leaning on Jesus' bosom one of His disciples, whom Jesus loved.
Simon Peter therefore motioned to him to ask who it was of whom He spoke.
Then, leaning back on Jesus' breast, he said to Him,
Lord, who is it?
segments.speaker: Disciple

segments.text: It is he to whom I shall give a piece of bread when I have dipped it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And having dipped the bread, He gave it to Judas Iscariot, the son of Simon.
Now after the piece of bread, Satan entered him.
What you do, do quickly.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But no one at the table knew for what reason He said this to him.
For some thought, because Judas had the money box, that Jesus had said to him, 'Buy those things we need for the feast,' or that he should give something to the poor.
Having received the piece of bread, he then went out immediately. And it was night.
Now the Son of Man is glorified, and God is glorified in Him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If God is glorified in Him, God will also glorify Him in Himself, and glorify Him immediately.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Little children, I shall be with you a little while longer. You will seek Me; and as I said to the Jews, 'Where I am going, you cannot come,' so now I say to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another; as I have loved you, that you also love one another.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: By this all will know that you are My disciples, if you have love for one another.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, where are You going?
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Where I am going you cannot follow Me now, but you shall follow Me afterward.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, why can I not follow You now? I will lay down my life for Your sake.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Will you lay down your life for My sake? Most assuredly, I say to you, the rooster shall not crow till you have denied Me three times.
segments.speaker: Jesus
